name: accounting firms processing 10–20 paystubs/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 paystubs/month, manual creation causes delays in employee payments. We automate paystub generation instead of manual paystub creation and email distribution.
problem_solved: Manual creation and distribution of paystubs leads to delays and errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual creation and distribution of paystubs leads to delays and errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 paystubs/month, manual creation causes delays in employee payments. We automate paystub generation instead of manual paystub creation and email distribution.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual paystub creation and email distribution

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–20 paystubs/month, manual creation causes delays in employee payments. We automate paystub generation instead of manual paystub creation and email distribution.
